commands.name: PDF文本提取
commands.command: python -c "import fitz; doc = fitz.open('<file.pdf>'); text = ''; [text := text + page.get_text() for page in doc]; print(text)"
commands.description: 从PDF文件提取文本 - 需要安装PyMuPDF

commands.name: 数据可视化
commands.command: python -c "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt; import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_csv('<file.csv>'); df.plot(); plt.savefig('plot.png'); plt.show()"
commands.description: 使用Python可视化CSV数据 - 需要安装pandas和matplotlib

commands.name: SQL查询CSV
commands.command: python -c "import pandas as pd; import sqlite3; df = pd.read_csv('<file.csv>'); conn = sqlite3.connect(':memory:'); df.to_sql('data', conn, index=False); print(pd.read_sql_query('SELECT * FROM data WHERE <column> > <value>', conn))"
commands.description: 使用SQL查询CSV数据 - 需要安装pandas
